word: G448 - ἀνίλεως - aníleōs - an-ee'-leh-oce - Without mercy

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀνίλεως

- Transliteration: Anileos

- Phonetic: an-ee'-leh-oce

- Definition:

1. without mercy, merciless

- Origin: from G1 (as a negative particle) and G2436

- TDNT entry: 2:487,*

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G1 (as a negative particle) and G2436; inexorable: - without mercy.
